mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_partner_eval WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '재평가' THEN 0 WHEN '완료' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, eval_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_partner_eval WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_partner_eval WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_partner_eval WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_partner_eval (contractor_registration_id, company_name, industry, mgr_name, partner_mgr, contact, eval_date, score_safety, score_health, score_env, score_mgmt, accident_count, next_eval_date, status, opinion, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{contractorRegistrationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName}, #{industry}, #{mgrName}, #{partnerMgr}, #{contact}, #{evalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{scoreSafety}0, #{scoreHealth}0, #{scoreEnv}0, #{scoreMgmt}0, #{accidentCount}0, #{nextEvalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}'완료', #{opinion}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_partner_eval SET contractor_registration_id = #{contractorRegistrationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, company_name = #{companyName}, industry = #{industry}, mgr_name = #{mgrName}, partner_mgr = #{partnerMgr}, contact = #{contact}, eval_date = #{evalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, score_safety = #{scoreSafety}0, score_health = #{scoreHealth}0, score_env = #{scoreEnv}0, score_mgmt = #{scoreMgmt}0, accident_count = #{accidentCount}0, next_eval_date = #{nextEvalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, opinion = #{opinion}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_partner_eval SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
